zh.siteSubtitle: 波斯尼亚圣母显现（1981年至今）
zh.homeIntro1: 默主哥耶（Medjugorje）是波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的一个小村庄。1981年6月24日，六名当地少年声称在村外山坡上看到了圣母玛利亚的显现。她自称「和平女王」（Kraljica Mira），身着白色面纱和蓝灰色长袍，头顶有星冠环绕。
zh.homeIntro2: 此后四十余年，六位神视者（Vicka、Mirjana、Ivanka、Ivan、Marija、Jakov）持续报告圣母的讯息。圣母向他们逐一揭示了十个关于世界未来的秘密，并反复强调五大核心主题：和平、信仰、皈依、祈祷与斋戒——被称为「五块石头」，如同大卫对抗歌利亚的五颗鹅卵石。
zh.homeIntro3: 2024年9月19日，梵蒂冈教义部在教宗方济各的批准下，对默主哥耶现象授予「无异议」（nihil obstat）认可，肯定了其丰硕的灵修果实——包括大量皈依、圣事复兴和圣召涌现——但并未对显现的超自然性质作出判定。据估计已有超过四千万朝圣者到访默主哥耶。
zh.coreQuote: 「亲爱的孩子们！我来到你们中间是因为天主派遣了我。我的名字是和平女王。我呼唤你们走向和平、斋戒与祈祷。」
keyPointsList: 1981年6月24日 —— 六名少年首次在波德布尔多山坡看到圣母显现
1981年6月25日 —— 圣母首次与神视者对话，自称「和平女王」
五块石头 —— 圣母反复强调的五大核心讯息：和平、信仰、皈依、祈祷、斋戒
十大秘密 —— 圣母向每位神视者逐一揭示十个关于世界未来的秘密
第三秘密 —— 圣母许诺将在首次显现的山上留下一个超自然的、不可摧毁的可见标记
2024年9月 —— 梵蒂冈教义部授予「无异议」认可，肯定灵修果实
sourceList: 讯息内容整理自默主哥耶官方讯息档案（medjugorje.org）
十大秘密相关信息参考 medjugorje.com 专题页面（The 10 Secrets）
梵蒂冈认可详情参考教廷新闻（Vatican News）及维基百科（Wikipedia）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和教会文献
编者观点不代表学术或教会定论
站点图标采用十字架山丘——默主哥耶的十字架山（Križevac）是当地最知名的地标，山顶竖立着1934年建造的混凝土十字架

en.homeIntro1: Medjugorje is a small village in Bosnia and Herzegovina. On June 24, 1981, six local teenagers reported seeing an apparition of the Virgin Mary on a hillside outside the village. She identified herself as the 'Queen of Peace' (Kraljica Mira), wearing a white veil and bluish-grey robe with a crown of stars around her head.
en.homeIntro2: For over four decades since, the six visionaries (Vicka, Mirjana, Ivanka, Ivan, Marija, and Jakov) have continued to report messages from Our Lady. She has gradually revealed to each of them ten secrets concerning future world events, while repeatedly emphasizing five core themes: peace, faith, conversion, prayer, and fasting — known as the 'Five Stones,' like the five pebbles David used against Goliath.
en.homeIntro3: On September 19, 2024, the Vatican's Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, with Pope Francis's approval, granted a 'nihil obstat' (no objection) to the Medjugorje phenomenon, recognizing its abundant spiritual fruits — including numerous conversions, sacramental renewal, and vocations — while not pronouncing on the supernatural character of the apparitions. An estimated 40 million pilgrims have visited Medjugorje.
en.coreQuote: "Dear children! I have come among you because God has sent me. My name is Queen of Peace. I call you to peace, fasting, and prayer."
keyPointsList: June 24, 1981 —— Six teenagers first see the apparition on Podbrdo hill
June 25, 1981 —— Our Lady first speaks to the visionaries, identifies as 'Queen of Peace'
Five Stones —— Five core messages repeatedly emphasized: peace, faith, conversion, prayer, fasting
Ten Secrets —— Our Lady gradually reveals ten secrets about the world's future to each visionary
Third Secret —— Our Lady promises to leave a supernatural, indestructible, visible sign on the hill of first apparition
September 2024 —— Vatican's DDF grants 'nihil obstat,' recognizing spiritual fruits
sourceList: Messages compiled from the official Medjugorje message archive (medjugorje.org)
Ten secrets information from medjugorje.com (The 10 Secrets)
Vatican approval details from Vatican News (Vatican News) and Wikipedia (Wikipedia)
Verification based on public news reports and Church documents
Editorial opinions do not represent academic or ecclesiastical consensus
Site icon: cross on hill — Križevac (Cross Mountain) is Medjugorje's most iconic landmark, topped by a concrete cross built in 1934
